title: agent-sdk as secondary answers delegate() → schema-valid {summary, artifacts} + artifact write + decision log

tests.summary: sdk-bridge-ok — Bridge block (1 test) green: agent-sdk as a secondary answers delegate() with the injected fake client; validateDelegationResult() == [] (schema-valid {summary, artifacts}); summary carries the model output; artifacts[0] matches artifacts/delegations/; the full output is written to the Artifact Store (writeArtifact called once); the delegation is appended via logDecision with {kind:'delegation', runtime:'agent-sdk'}.

probe.summary: The fitting verify hook runs the bridge self-test (read-only, no SDK import, no network): fence default-deny holds, harness full/lean wire correctly and never load user settings, every static provider base URL is non-Anthropic, deepseek caps text+tool-use only → prints 'ok'.

notes: Cloned from the codex-runtime bridge pattern: task spec via STDIN (never argv), broad model allowlist (any proxied/native model string), requiredKey wired per-provider so a missing cloud key fails loudly. The bridge reuses the shared delegate() core in packages/claude-pty/src/runtime-bridge.mjs unchanged.
